thoughts: The user has explicitly requested navigation to https://www.foxsports.com/. This is the starting point to access MLS standings information on the Fox Sports website.

This link to the SOCCER section ("/soccer") should lead to the soccer homepage where I can find navigation to MLS standings. This is the main soccer section header link that will take me to soccer-specific content including MLS standings.
This MLS link in the "FOLLOW YOUR FAVORITE LEAGUES & TOURNAMENTS" section will navigate directly to MLS-specific content where standings should be accessible.

The "SCORES" navigation link (element __id__="690") is likely to contain standings information, as sports websites typically organize current standings alongside scores. This will help me locate the MLS standings table with team rankings, wins, losses, and points.

Clicking on the MLS link in the dropdown menu will navigate to the MLS-specific section of Fox Sports where I should be able to find a standings or table link to view the current MLS standings with team rankings, wins, losses, and points.
The breadcrumb link "SOCCER" (element __id__="1152") will take me back to the main soccer section where I can find the proper MLS navigation and standings link.

The "LEAGUES" link (element 690) with URL "https://www.foxsports.com/soccer/leagues" is the most direct navigation path to find MLS standings. This section should contain organized league information including standings tables for various soccer leagues including MLS.

The MLS link at element __id__="731" with text "MLS" and href="/soccer/mls" will navigate me to the MLS-specific page where I can find navigation options for standings, scores, and other MLS information needed to complete the user's request for current MLS standings.

The navigation bar shows a "STANDINGS" link (element 1116) which will directly navigate to the MLS standings page where I can find the complete standings data including team rankings, wins, losses, points, and other relevant statistics that the user requested.

The webpage contains complete MLS standings data for both Eastern and Western Conferences. Elements 1168-1904 contain the Eastern Conference standings table with all team data, and elements 1910-2646 contain the Western Conference standings table. These sections include all requested information: team rankings (1-15 in each conference), matches played, points, win-draw-loss records, points per game, goals for/against, goal differential, and home/away records. This comprehensive data fully satisfies the user's request for current MLS standings with team rankings, wins, losses, points, and other relevant statistics.
